kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/classrooms path_url=/api/v1/classrooms headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/courses path_url=/api/v1/courses headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICJWUnRFY2lDLTJvRnZXZnU1cG9SbU1OVzdrWnpaS0VVNGNTSU83SlZxZlR3In0..orrXbU8Dctzy-6OiKX2KGgbqFIGrjr_J33AEzQsrzuXPHvYrDPyGBb-Q6LIzcvf4ae7OjPuCXQTDSoivSEQ_xnJtTDEaRQwPc5ofn-hLtCYahq80kL4R15H9OHTMTQl3_85Wdk5--hzG5I_gqv-bdCAgR2KO-E-MtQuBzcp8yrsmRrBrqtLLGoGWyR4xNGXomi87M_aKpcd4PlWXFlqLnMgXogcL0grLoPYZtYKBZflGl6HxrnEobUME32c65ze5rhA7OB8G7wmoPF_YuLlHheqfrzHYlXeDlOMhOfYX1Ru_2OR3EvIZunFkJY3Vuay4-bef3ZzkOzvesQpr2g-yAw', 'Content-Length': '108', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"title": "Curso para Turma 1774794607", "description": "Curso auxiliar para turma", "category": "auxiliar"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.
